{"code":"(def all-sentry (sentry_issues))

;; Filter for unresolved issues
(def unresolved-sentry (filter #(= (get % :status) "unresolved") all-sentry))

;; Find the one with highest users_affected
(def highest-impact 
  (max-key #(get % :users_affected 0) unresolved-sentry))

;; Show the relevant fields
{:project (get highest-impact :project)
 :id (get highest-impact :id)
 :title (g…(+122)
